visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with dark hair wearing a black top with cutouts stands in a warehouse-style supermarket aisle. She holds a large blue box titled 'BARK' featuring a collection of plush pet toys. Behind her, industrial shelving is stacked with large bags of pet food, illuminated by bright overhead warehouse lighting. (2) The camera shifts to a closer view of the toy set on the shelf. The box contains five distinct plush items: a pizza slice, a chocolate chip cookie, a membership card, a long hot dog, and a soda cup. Each toy has cartoon eyes and a smiling expression, suggesting a playful, friendly design for dogs. (3) The woman points at the 'Executive Member' card attachment on the box. She looks directly at the camera with an animated expression, gesturing enthusiastically. Her hand movements are energetic as she highlights the specific branding elements that mimic real-world warehouse club memberships. (4) A close-up shot focuses on her hands as she squishes the plush pizza toy. The toy's yellow and red fabric reacts to the pressure, showing its soft, squeezable nature. The camera captures her micro-expressions of delight as she interacts with the tactile components of the product. (5) She holds the soda cup plush, which is blue with a red straw. She demonstrates how the toy is designed with layers, pointing to the illustrations on the back of the box that show a hidden 'ice cube' toy inside. The editing uses fast cuts to emphasize the toy's features. (6) The woman stands in a medium shot, continuing her energetic presentation. She gestures toward the pricing information on the shelf above her while maintaining high eye contact with the lens. The background remains consistent with the retail environment, featuring metal racks and bulk packaging. (7) A vibrant rainbow graphic is overlaid on the frame as she discusses the value of the product. She points to various icons and text bubbles that appear, reinforcing the 'variety show' editing style. Her posture is forward-leaning and engaging throughout the segment. (8) In the final phase, she holds the box close to her chest and then playfully moves it as if putting it back on the shelf before pulling it back. She ends with a bright smile, while purple and white stylized text flashes on the screen.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 549元超值買!. [Variety]: 寵物版好市多 黑卡會員組. (2) [Subtitle]: 超可愛的 你的狗狗也要來好市多. [Variety]: 汪汪探險隊. (3) [Subtitle]: 這是好市多黑卡組. (4) [Subtitle]: 然後最可愛是什麼 高級的. (5) [Subtitle]: 你的好市多 你的狗狗會有好市多會員. (6) [Subtitle]: 可是他不能進好市多. (7) [Subtitle]: 可是他有會員名牌了. (8) [Subtitle]: 我覺得他這次的玩具做的超可愛. (9) [Subtitle]: 他這個上面還有顆粒刺刺球. (10) [Subtitle]: 然後跟那個塑膠. (11) [Subtitle]: 這個大熱狗可以拿來打屁股. (12) [Subtitle]: 他這個可樂啊他咬壞之後. (13) [Subtitle]: 裡面會有冰塊. [Variety]: 裡面有冰塊. (14) [Subtitle]: 你們家狗狗如果是玩具破壞者. (15) [Subtitle]: 他咬壞以後就會得到一個新的玩具. (16) [Subtitle]: 裡面是小冰塊然後是球球形狀的. (17) [Subtitle]: 然後你要把它咬壞了才會有出現. (18) [Subtitle]: 好可愛 他打開冰塊是長這樣. (19) [Subtitle]: 哇 這組真的很可愛. (20) [Subtitle]: 因為549元 他總共有5樣東西. (21) [Subtitle]: 一個100塊. [Variety]: 549, 5樣, 一個100. (22) [Subtitle]: 這樣子很划算耶 趕快把你家狗狗名字寫上去. (23) [Subtitle]: 你要嗎 放回去!. [Variety]: 放回去!. (24) [Subtitle]: 好啦給你買.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character presenting the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a black top with cutouts on the chest and shoulder, and silver earrings.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Costco warehouse aisle with high-reaching metal shelves stocked with large bulk bags of dog food and various pet supplies.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-arousal, energetic female voice speaking in Traditional Chinese over an upbeat, major-mode electronic BGM. The tempo is brisk, around 124 BPM, featuring a strong rhythmic beat. A sharp 'pop' SFX accompanies the initial text appearance. (2) A male voice responds briefly, maintaining a friendly, conversational tone. The background music remains consistent in volume. A 'ding' SFX is heard as price information is highlighted. The female voice continues with a rising intonation, conveying excitement and persuasion. (3) During the demonstration of the plush toys, the sound of crinkling plastic or fabric friction is audible but subtle. The vocal delivery becomes more descriptive and rapid. Cartoonish transition SFX (whooshes) bridge the quick visual cuts, maintaining a high acoustic energy throughout the product breakdown. (4) The final segment features a playful banter between the two voices. The music swells slightly as a finishing motif. A final 'sparkle' or 'pop' sound effect marks the end of the video, with the female voice concluding on a high, positive note.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Breakdown -> Value Analysis -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a specific pet toy bundle available at Costco. It uses a high-energy vlog style to highlight the unique features of the toys (hidden elements, membership card branding) and emphasize the cost-effectiveness of the set.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is directly presenting and reviewing a specific product available at a known retailer (Costco), citing price and features to encourage purchase.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy retail vlog with rapid editing and variety-show graphics typical of Taiwanese social media content. Focuses on the novelty of pet toys mimicking adult retail experiences.
